data.title: Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) Protection
data.description: Robust DDoS protection measures to prevent downtime.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and AWS WAF to detect and mitigate DDoS attacks.

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Granular control of access permissions for users and services.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM for managing user roles and policies securely.

data.title: Encryption and Key Management
data.description: Data encryption in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: AWS KMS and TLS for encryption protocols.

data.title: Security Monitoring and Incident Response
data.description: Continuous monitoring and logging to detect suspicious activities.
data.technical_spec: AWS CloudTrail and AWS GuardDuty for security intelligence.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular security assessments and patch management.
data.technical_spec: AWS Inspector for evaluating application security posture.
